workExperience.title: Async
details: Architect and scale a high-performance audio and video editing web application using React and TypeScript.
Offload heavy computational rendering and media processing to Web Workers and WebAssembly, minimising main-thread blocking.
Implement advanced asset optimisation techniques using modern browser APIs, reducing bundle sizes and improving Core Web Vitals.
Collaborate with cross-functional product teams to establish modern engineering standards and deliver near-native web experiences.
Utilise AI-assisted tools like Claude Code to accelerate development velocity and streamline coding workflows.
Expand backend service functionality by implementing new features, applying full-stack skills end-to-end.

workExperience.title: BetConstruct (Pascal Gaming)
details: Served as Tech Lead for Pascal Gaming, a major enterprise gaming division within BetConstruct.
Engineered high-performance, real-time web arcade games using Pixi.js and Spine for complex 2D animations.
Drove architectural decisions for game engines ensuring low-latency data handling and smooth cross-browser performance.
Mentored incoming engineers, standardising modern JavaScript/TypeScript practices and accelerating onboarding.

workExperience.title: BeeGraphy
details: Developed and optimised high-performance, cloud-based 3D parametric and computational modelling tools running in the browser.
Architected scalable web applications and real-time collaborative editors with low-latency rendering.
Mentored junior engineers on clean code practices, modern frameworks, and optimal data management structures.

workExperience.title: SFL LLC (acquired by DataArt)
details: Developed complex, secure web interfaces for a large-scale banking application using React and modern state management.
Built deep domain expertise in banking products, financial workflows, and secure data handling standards.
Engineered and maintained a high-performance API gateway using Node.js for microservice data aggregation.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on scalable layouts, cross-browser optimisation, and stable API connectivity.

workExperience.title: BetConstruct
details: Led a frontend team, managing delivery timelines and standardising Redux state management across web and mobile modules.
Engineered and shipped cross-platform applications using React and React Native.
Trained and onboarded junior engineers on the React ecosystem, component libraries, and hybrid app performance.

workExperience.title: Project Nulla
details: Developed a responsive e-commerce web application for an online food delivery platform.
Built foundational UI components using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript for consistent cross-device rendering.
Translated design mockups into pixel-accurate, cross-browser compatible layouts under tight timelines.

workExperience.title: Basic IT Center
details: Mentored aspiring developers, helping them build foundational skills to launch software engineering careers.
Designed and delivered curriculum covering HTML5, JavaScript, React, Redux, and asynchronous programming.
Conducted coding workshops and reviewed student projects to instil clean coding standards.
